heading: Today
text: Sun mixing with clouds. Showers and thunderstorms, mostly I-89 west and south this afternoon.

heading: Tuesday Night
text: A good chance of showers and thunderstorms. Warmer, more humid.

heading: Wednesday
text: Hazy, hot, humid.  Localized showers and thunderstoms possible.

heading: Thursday
text: Partly sunny, very hot, and very humid.  Localized afternoon showers and storms possible.
